title: Satrumun Lyrics Madha Gaja Raja Songs Lyrics
stanzas:

Music - Vijay Antony

Movie - Madha Gaja Raja		 .
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

unnai kandadhum eppadi thozhaindhaen

Unnai paarthadhum thookam marandhaen
kadhal vandhadhum kaatril midhandhaen
nee illaamal naan eppadi irupen oh ho oh..

jaladhosam idikudhey
nee irundhaal en arugiley
ennakedho nadakudhey oh vuho ..huvoho..

Satrumun varai ennil irundhaen
unnai kandadhum eppadi thozhaindhaen
Otrai nodiyile uzhagai marandhaen oh ho oh..

Yaaro poley aanen naaney
enmel kadhal kavila
vaanam pogum dhooram poley
unmel aasai viriya
iravil un ninaivil
en urakkam kettu thozhaiya
kanavil en arugil
haiyo vandhu kollaadhey..oh vuho ..huvoho..

Satrumun varai ennil irundhaen
unnai kandadhum eppadi thozhaindhaen
Otrai nodiyile uzhagai marandhaen oh ho oh..

Nee ennai paarthaal podhum podhum
enmel pookkal sidharum o ho..
nee or vaarthai sonnaal podhum
theeyai theendumm viralum o oh..

unnaal thaagam vellam poley
enmel pongi valiya
neeyum ayyyo paarvai paarthaai
ennul theeyaai aeriya  oh vuho ..huvoho..

Satrumun varai ennil irundhaen
unnai kandadhum eppadi thozhaindhaen
Otrai nodiyile uzhagai marandhaen oh ho oh..

Unvizhi chaaral mazhayile
jaladhosam idikudhey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Satrumun'?

The song 'Satrumun' explores themes of love and longing, expressing the emotions of missing a loved one.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Madha Gaja Raja'?

In Madha Gaja Raja, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings of love and separation, enhancing the emotional narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Satrumun'?

The song is sung by Santhosh Hariharan and composed by Vijay Antony.

When was 'Satrumun' released?

'Satrumun' was released on January 13, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Satrumun', the protagonist expresses deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully captured through Santhosh Hariharan's soulful rendition. The song plays a pivotal role in the narrative of Madha Gaja Raja, highlighting the complexities of relationships. With its melancholic yet romantic vibe, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and heartache. The poignant lyrics by Annamalai further enhance the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Satrumun from the Madha Gaja Raja soundtrack is a mesmerizing blend of heartfelt lyrics and soothing melodies. Santhosh Hariharan's soulful voice, combined with Vijay Antony's captivating music, creates an enchanting experience. Dive into the emotional depths of love and longing with this beautifully crafted song.
stanzaMeanings: I have been here until the end, how did I worship you when I saw you? I forgot my sorrow in that moment, oh ho oh..
When I saw you, I forgot my sleep. When love came, I got lost in the breeze. Without you, how will I be, oh ho oh..
In your eyes, like rain, there is a flood. If you are near me, something will happen, oh vuho ..huvoho..
I have been here until the end, how did I worship you when I saw you? I forgot my sorrow in that moment, oh ho oh..
I have become like someone else, love is like a distant sky. My desire for you is like a long distance, in my dreams, my sleep is disturbed, oh vuho ..huvoho..
I have been here until the end, how did I worship you when I saw you? I forgot my sorrow in that moment, oh ho oh..
If you look at me, it’s enough, flowers will bloom on me, oh ho.. If you say just one word, it will burn away the fire, oh oh..
Your gaze is like a flood of thirst pouring over me. Oh, when I see you, it feels like my heart is on fire, oh vuho ..huvoho..
I have been here until the end, how did I worship you when I saw you? I forgot my sorrow in that moment, oh ho oh..
In your eyes, like rain, there is a flood. If you are near me, something will happen, oh vuho ..huvoho..
